title: Top M.Tech Transportation Engineering College in Noida
content: NOTE-Classes will be held in the Evening and on Saturdays & Sundays B.E/B.Tech in relevant discipline with minimum 50% marks or equivalent with minimum of ONE Year Full time / Regular working Experience 01 An ability to independently carry out research /investigation and development work to solve practical problems. 02 An ability to write and present a substantial technical report/document. 03 Students should be able to demonstrate a degree of mastery over the area as per the specialization of the program. The mastery should be at a level higher than the requirements in the appropriate bachelor program 01 Graduates of the program will have in-depth knowledge to identify and formulate challenging problems in transportation engineering, apply appropriate research methodologies, use modern engineering tools and provide technically sound, economical and sustainable solutions. 02 Graduates will have ability for higher studies and undertake high value research on transportation engineering and other related issues. 03 Graduate of program will have sound analytical and lateral thinking ability to engage in lifelong learning for professional advancement to cope up with multidisciplinary and changing technologies in transportation engineering. 01 Develop the ability to analyse a system, component or process in the knowledge areas of Transportation Engineering in real time problems. 02 Conduct investigations and address complex Transportation engineering problems; utilize and develop innovative tools and techniques that are appropriate in Transportation Engineering discipline.
